title: scutellaria fruticosa
intro: Scutellaria fruticosa, also known as Lizard Tail or Huang Jing, is a type of plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Scutellaria fruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, among others. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
